languages.text: "Вы же не думали, что после всего, что вы мне устроили, я не найду способ избавиться от вас?"
"Did you think I wouldn't find a way to get rid of you, after all the trouble you've caused me?"
languages.original_text: "Вы же не думали, что после всего, что вы мне устроили, я не найду способ избавиться от вас?"

traits.locale_text: "Did you think I wouldn't find a way to get rid of you, after all the trouble you've caused me?"
"Did you think I wouldn't find a way to get rid of you, after all the trouble you've caused me?"
"Did you think I wouldn't find a way to get rid of you, after all the trouble you've caused me?"

languages.text: «¿Pensaba que no encontraría la forma de librarme de usted después de todos los problemas que me ha causado?».
languages.original_text: "Did you think I wouldn't find a way to get rid of you, after all the trouble you've caused me?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Pensaba que no encontraría la forma de librarme de usted después de todos los problemas que me ha causado?».

languages.text: “你给我惹了这么多麻烦，难道还真以为我不会想办法把你打发走？”
languages.original_text: "Did you think I wouldn't find a way to get rid of you, after all the trouble you've caused me?"

traits.locale_text: “你给我惹了这么多麻烦，难道还真以为我不会想办法把你打发走？”

languages.text: « Après tous les ennuis que vous m'avez causés, vous auriez dû savoir que je trouverais un moyen de me débarrasser de vous. »
languages.original_text: "Did you think I wouldn't find a way to get rid of you, after all the trouble you've caused me?"

traits.locale_text: « Après tous les ennuis que vous m'avez causés, vous auriez dû savoir que je trouverais un moyen de me débarrasser de vous. »

languages.text: "Bana açtığın onca dertten sonra senden kurtulmanın bir yolunu bulamayacağımı mı sandın?"
languages.original_text: "Did you think I wouldn't find a way to get rid of you, after all the trouble you've caused me?"

traits.locale_text: "Bana açtığın onca dertten sonra senden kurtulmanın bir yolunu bulamayacağımı mı sandın?"

languages.text: "Dachtet Ihr, ich würde keinen Weg finde, Euch loszuwerden, nach all dem Ärger, den Ihr mir bereitet habt?"
languages.original_text: "Did you think I wouldn't find a way to get rid of you, after all the trouble you've caused me?"

traits.locale_text: "Dachtet Ihr, ich würde keinen Weg finde, Euch loszuwerden, nach all dem Ärger, den Ihr mir bereitet habt?"

languages.text: 「君が俺に与えた苦労を考えると、君を排除する方法を見つけられないと思っていたのか？」
languages.original_text: "Did you think I wouldn't find a way to get rid of you, after all the trouble you've caused me?"

traits.locale_text: 「君が俺に与えた苦労を考えると、君を排除する方法を見つけられないと思っていたのか？」
